meaning: 这首儿歌通过描绘夜空中的星星，激发婴幼儿对自然现象的好奇心与想象力，同时通过轻柔的节奏帮助宝宝建立安全感，培养安静入睡的习惯。
characterDescription: A cute, round-faced baby with big sparkling eyes, wearing soft pastel-colored pajamas (light blue onesie with white clouds), soft fluffy texture, friendly expression.
styleDescription: Bright cartoon style, vivid colors, rounded and cute shapes, soft lighting, suitable for infants, high saturation but gentle tones, vector-like simplicity with warm textures.

scenes.title: 夜幕降临
scenes.description: 宝宝坐在窗边的小床上，双手托腮，睁大眼睛好奇地看着窗外逐渐变黑的天空，脸上带着期待和一点点惊讶的表情。
scenes.prompt: A cute, round-faced baby with big sparkling eyes, wearing soft pastel-colored pajamas (light blue onesie with white clouds), soft fluffy texture, friendly expression., A cute baby sitting on a bed looking out of a window at the evening sky, curious expression, hands on cheeks, soft indoor lighting, bright cartoon style, vivid colors, rounded shapes., Close-up shot focusing on the baby's face and the window view, warm interior vs cool exterior contrast., Bright cartoon style, vivid colors, rounded and cute shapes, soft lighting, suitable for infants, high saturation but gentle tones, vector-like simplicity with warm textures.
scenes.compositionHint: Close-up shot focusing on the baby's face and the window view, warm interior vs cool exterior contrast.

scenes.title: 第一颗星亮起
scenes.description: 天空中一颗明亮的星星突然亮起，发出柔和的光芒。宝宝伸出手指指向那颗星，眼睛亮晶晶的，露出惊喜的笑容。
scenes.prompt: A cute, round-faced baby with big sparkling eyes, wearing soft pastel-colored pajamas (light blue onesie with white clouds), soft fluffy texture, friendly expression., A single bright star shining in the dark blue sky, a cute baby pointing at it with a surprised and happy smile, magical glow, bright cartoon style, simple background., Low angle shot showing the star above and the baby below, emphasizing the connection between child and sky., Bright cartoon style, vivid colors, rounded and cute shapes, soft lighting, suitable for infants, high saturation but gentle tones, vector-like simplicity with warm textures.
scenes.compositionHint: Low angle shot showing the star above and the baby below, emphasizing the connection between child and sky.

scenes.title: 仰望星空
scenes.description: 镜头拉远，展示宝宝躺在柔软的垫子上，周围环绕着许多闪烁的星星。宝宝张开双臂，仿佛在拥抱整个星空，表情安详快乐。
scenes.prompt: A cute, round-faced baby with big sparkling eyes, wearing soft pastel-colored pajamas (light blue onesie with white clouds), soft fluffy texture, friendly expression., Baby lying on a soft rug, surrounded by many glowing stars, arms open wide, peaceful and happy expression, dreamy atmosphere, bright cartoon style, vibrant night sky colors., Wide shot capturing the baby and the starry environment, circular composition to guide eye to the center., Bright cartoon style, vivid colors, rounded and cute shapes, soft lighting, suitable for infants, high saturation but gentle tones, vector-like simplicity with warm textures.
scenes.compositionHint: Wide shot capturing the baby and the starry environment, circular composition to guide eye to the center.

scenes.title: 星星的秘密
scenes.description: 几颗拟人化的小星星眨着眼睛飞近宝宝，宝宝咯咯笑着伸手去抓，星星们调皮地躲闪，画面充满动感与趣味。
scenes.prompt: A cute, round-faced baby with big sparkling eyes, wearing soft pastel-colored pajamas (light blue onesie with white clouds), soft fluffy texture, friendly expression., Cute anthropomorphic stars with smiling faces flying near the baby, baby laughing and reaching out, playful interaction, dynamic motion lines, bright cartoon style, cheerful mood., Medium shot focusing on the interaction between baby and stars, diagonal composition for movement., Bright cartoon style, vivid colors, rounded and cute shapes, soft lighting, suitable for infants, high saturation but gentle tones, vector-like simplicity with warm textures.

scenes.title: 温柔守护
scenes.description: 月亮婆婆（拟人化，慈祥微笑）在云层后轻轻注视着宝宝，星星们像守护神一样围在宝宝床边。宝宝打了一个哈欠，眼神开始变得朦胧困倦。
scenes.prompt: A cute, round-faced baby with big sparkling eyes, wearing soft pastel-colored pajamas (light blue onesie with white clouds), soft fluffy texture, friendly expression., Moon goddess smiling gently from behind clouds, stars guarding the baby's bed, baby yawning sleepily, cozy and safe atmosphere, soft pastel colors, bright cartoon style., High angle shot looking down at the baby, framing with moon and stars to create a protective circle., Bright cartoon style, vivid colors, rounded and cute shapes, soft lighting, suitable for infants, high saturation but gentle tones, vector-like simplicity with warm textures.

scenes.title: 进入梦乡
scenes.description: 宝宝已经闭上眼睛，嘴角带着甜美的微笑，呼吸均匀。周围的星星光芒变得更加柔和微弱，像是在轻声哄睡。
scenes.prompt: A cute, round-faced baby with big sparkling eyes, wearing soft pastel-colored pajamas (light blue onesie with white clouds), soft fluffy texture, friendly expression., Baby sleeping soundly with a sweet smile, eyes closed, soft starlight dimming around, peaceful scene, calming blue and purple tones, bright cartoon style, serene mood., Close-up on baby's face, shallow depth of field, soft focus on background stars., Bright cartoon style, vivid colors, rounded and cute shapes, soft lighting, suitable for infants, high saturation but gentle tones, vector-like simplicity with warm textures.

scenes.title: 温馨大合唱
scenes.description: 所有星星都变成了可爱的小音符精灵，围绕在熟睡的宝宝周围跳舞。画面温馨和谐，象征着音乐与梦境的美好陪伴。
scenes.prompt: A cute, round-faced baby with big sparkling eyes, wearing soft pastel-colored pajamas (light blue onesie with white clouds), soft fluffy texture, friendly expression., Star spirits turned into musical notes dancing around the sleeping baby, magical and harmonious, warm golden and blue hues, bright cartoon style, final wholesome scene., Circular composition with stars forming a ring around the baby, leading eye to the sleeping child., Bright cartoon style, vivid colors, rounded and cute shapes, soft lighting, suitable for infants, high saturation but gentle tones, vector-like simplicity with warm textures.
scenes.narration: 一闪一闪亮晶晶，满天都是小星星。
scenes.compositionHint: Circular composition with stars forming a ring around the baby, leading eye to the sleeping child.
